title: Sharp Fonts [Scale 2x] (GUI Scale dependant)
description: A sharp font in the style of PVP packs, that looks vectorized on your screen
body:
# [THIS IS THE 32x VERSION FOR SCALE 2x]
# This pack is also available on Curseforge!

[![This pack is available on Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be27fc74ec25823c7ae6c0205038b3d419f4d7b3.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sharp-fonts-32x) [![This pack is available on Curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5267ff7a4de63cacf0d3520d0ab27fdc58865810.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/sharpfonts-32x) [![Join our Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f6cbe6e30f50da94aff2eb76fdb68c440eb46c7.png)](https://discord.gg/ecGUpbC58d)

Modrinth said I can't upload multiple different versions of a pack on one page because it doesn't follow their intended path, so you can get the other resolutions here:

- **Scale 2x**: **You are here already!**
- **Scale 3x**: [48x pack for Scale 3x](<https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sharp-fonts-48x>)
- **Scale 4x**: [64x pack for Scale 4x](<https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sharp-fonts-64x>)
- **Scale 5x**: [80x pack for Scale 5x](<https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sharp-fonts-80x>)

# Quick Description
This pack adds a **custom-made font** that looks **sharper, and the diagonals look so smooth they almost don’t feel pixel-based at all**. And yes, this version has support for **ALL** unicode letters.

# How to use (NOTE)
In the **links**, you will see **four projects**, with different resolutions. This is purely because of how Minecraft scales up resolutions, and **if used incorrectly, can leave unwanted interpolation artifacts on your screen** that just look ugly.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30fdd4f9b8862d068de39f70c8c99891dfaa3f95_0.webp)

## Little chart to show you which pack to use corresponding to your GUI Scale:

| GUI Scale              | 2x               | 3x         | 4x   | 5x (1440p display or higher)  |
|:----------------------:|:------------------------:|:-------------------------:|:---------------------:|:--------------------:|
| 32x               | ✅        | ❌        | ✅ (sure, but use 64x for extra sharpness, come on) | ❌             |
| 48x                | ❌      | ✅       | ❌      | ❌               |
| 64x                | ❌        | ❌        | ✅      | ❌                 |
| 80x                | ❌        | ❌        | ❌     | ✅                 |

## Supported Unicode:

| Pack               | 2x       | 3x        | 4x       | 5x (1440p display or higher) |
|:----------------------:|:------------------------:|:-------------------------:|:---------------------:|:--------------------:|
| ascii              | ✅       | ✅       | ✅       | ✅       |
| accented           | ✅       | ✅       | ✅       | ✅       |
| ascii_sga          | ✅       | ✅       | ✅       | ✅       |
| asciillager        | ✅       | ✅       | ✅       | ✅       |
| nonlatin_european  | ✅       | ✅       | ✅       | ✅       |
